violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Observed crab rangoon in the freezer not being protected by the potential comtamination.--Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Observed sugar on the floor in the dry store room.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Food removed from original packaging was not placed in a container with an impervious and nonabsorbent cover. Observed an open can of ketchup in the cooler.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Observed a single use item used a cup in the sauces in the walk in cooler.

Hot storage of potentially hazardous food. — --Hot food storage facilities/equipment was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining temperature of potentially hazardous food at 140F or greater. Observed sushi rice at 118F and establishment also didn't have the ph strips to test the PH. This will be reheated above 140 and maintained at 140.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Observed curtain in between was very dirty at the time of inspection.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Observed handles of scoops in bulk bins.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed inside of both microwaves have dried food in them. Microwave at sushi station is very rusty on inside. -Observed cutting boards on cold hold unit need to be cleaned and sanitized.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed doors and sides of appliances need to be cleaned.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Observed grease dripping down front side of vent hood.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. -Observed test strips being used were not the correct strips.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Observed sanitizer in ware washer was 0ppm.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Observed dirty knife in one hand sink and food in other hand sink.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Observed floors, walls and ceilings all need to be cleaned.
Control of insects, rodents, and other pests. — --Insect electrocution or trapping device was installed in an inappropriate location. Observed sticky fly trap hanging in food prep area.
